identified_issues.title: Chaos Mode Isolation Failure
identified_issues.description: Experimental heavy 3D visualizations are present in the main production path, risking browser context window saturation and violating the V1 isolation mandate.

identified_issues.title: Missing Forensics Dock
identified_issues.description: SessionTimeLine and AxiomInspector exist independently and lack orchestration. Time and truth can drift, breaking epistemic correctness.

identified_issues.title: Hydration vs. Live Stream Race Condition
identified_issues.description: MonitorContainer connects to the live SSE telemetry stream before establishing the historical baseline, causing timeline pop-in and missing markers.

identified_issues.title: Missing Patch Export Functionality
identified_issues.description: The system lacks the frontend implementation to generate a downloadable .patch artifact from the backend unified diff string.

identified_issues.title: Semantic Bleed-Through
identified_issues.description: The UI contains hardcoded physics engine jargon (e.g., 'jax.lax.scan missing init state') instead of remaining strictly agnostic and relying on backend payloads.

identified_issues.title: Lack of Headless Bulk Selection
identified_issues.description: UnifiedLensExplorer does not currently utilize headless DOM selection, risking React fiber tree locking during bulk selection of friction points.

flags_and_warnings.title: Error Boundaries Audit Required
flags_and_warnings.description: Need to verify that React Error Boundaries are properly wrapping TelemetryChart and KEL components so that isolated render failures do not crash the 'God View'.

flags_and_warnings.title: Aurora Shaders Not Implemented
flags_and_warnings.description: GPU-accelerated fragment shaders for ambient telemetry background states are missing. This is a nice-to-have but not a V1 blocker.

actionable_suggestions.action: Execute: `mkdir -p src/_experimental/chaos && mv src/components/chaos/* src/_experimental/chaos/`. Remove associated imports from layout.
Create 'ForensicsDock.tsx' to wrap and synchronize SessionTimeLine and AxiomInspector. Mount it in the bottom grid row of GodViewLayout.
Refactor MonitorContainer to await `fetchReport()` (historical baseline) before calling `connectSSE()`.
Add a utility function in RemedialManifold using `new Blob([patchData], { type: 'text/x-patch' })` and a hidden `<a>` tag to trigger the browser download.
Audit UI components and replace hardcoded string descriptions with dynamic variables like `axiom.message` and `event.description` mapped from the JSON contracts.
Integrate '@viselect/vanilla' inside a `useRef` hook within UnifiedLensExplorer to handle bounding-box selection outside of the React lifecycle.
